2606.06273.title: Adapting Diffusion Language Models for Lossless Pixel-Level Image Transmission
2606.06273.paper_summary: Lossless pixel-level image transmission is a fundamental regime beyond semantic communications, because exact recovery requires both accurate symbol probability modeling and reliable delivery over noisy channels. This paper proposes DDM-SSCC, a discrete-diffusion-model-based separate source-channel coding framework for lossless image transmission. Different from raster-order autoregressive coding, the proposed source codec adapts a diffusion language model to pixel-token restoration and performs synchronized reverse arithmetic coding under bidirectional attention, allowing multiple masked tokens to be coded within one reverse denoising step. This progressive restoration process also yields a more favorable source representation for noisy transmission, since newly restored tokens can serve as bidirectional context in subsequent denoising steps. To bridge the gap between generation-oriented masked denoising and lossless arithmetic coding, we further introduce a Halton-guided denoising order, a mask-ratio-aware cosine schedule, and a lightweight temperature calibration module. These designs respectively improve spatial coverage, adapt the denoising pace to context reliability, and calibrate the probability tables used by arithmetic coding. Experiments on CIFAR10, DIV2K-LR-X4, and Kodak over additive white Gaussian noise and Rayleigh fading channels show that DDM-SSCC achieves better exact-recovery performance than representative lossless and semantic communication baselines, while ablation studies verify the effectiveness of the proposed denoising order, schedule, and calibration modules.
2606.06273.paper_summary_zh: 無損的像素級影像傳輸是超越語意通信的一個基本範疇，因為精確的恢復需要準確的符號概率建模和在噪聲通道上的可靠傳遞。本文提出了DDM-SSCC，一個基於離散擴散模型的獨立源通道編碼框架，用於無損影像傳輸。與光柵順序自回歸編碼不同，所提出的源編解碼器將擴散語言模型應用於像素標記的恢復，並在雙向注意力下執行同步的反向算術編碼，允許在一次反向去噪步驟中編碼多個被遮蔽的標記。這一漸進式的恢復過程也為噪聲傳輸產生了更有利的源表示，因為新恢復的標記可以在隨後的去噪步驟中作為雙向上下文。為了彌補以生成為導向的被遮蔽去噪和無損算術編碼之間的差距，我們進一步引入了哈爾頓引導的去噪順序、一個考慮遮蔽比的餘弦計劃，以及一個輕量級的溫度校準模塊。這些設計分別改善了空間覆蓋，將去噪速度適應於上下文的可靠性，並校準算術編碼所使用的概率表。在CIFAR10、DIV2K-LR-X4和Kodak上進行的實驗顯示，DDM-SSCC在加性白高斯噪聲和瑞利衰落通道下實現了比代表性的無損和語意通信基線更好的精確恢復性能，而消融研究則驗證了所提出的去噪順序、計劃和校準模塊的有效性。
2606.06273.author: Tianqi Ren et.al.
2606.06273.authors: Tianqi Ren, Rongpeng Li, Xianfu Chen, Yingyu Li, Zhifeng Zhao
